0: Right, time to put these godly─an' now aether-infused─hands to work!

2: Heh, I'll never tire of admirin' me handiwork. A multi-aspected phantasm o' highly concentrated aether, in perfect harmony with the very essence o' the weapon...

3: Behold the true potential of aetheric bleedin' infusion: <SheetEn(Item,2,IntegerParameter(1),1,1)/>!

4: Behold the true potential of aetheric bleedin' infusion: <SheetEn(Item,2,IntegerParameter(1),1,1)/> an' <SheetEn(Item,2,IntegerParameter(2),1,1)/>!

5: Feels good in the hand, doesn't it? Well worth the drudgery an' staggerin' financial cost, I'd wager.

6: Yer probably sick to death o' scrappin' after that nonsense with the aetherwells, but don't let me catch ye with that weapon languishin' in yer pack─get out there an' test its potential!
